posts.focus: A repeat-use product signal can matter more than the initial reaction to an internal demo.
posts.behavioral_transition: From judging a tool by launch reaction to observing voluntary repeat use and completed work artifacts.
posts.tension: Teams search roadmaps for product ideas while a repeated internal behavior may already expose one.
posts.coverage_delta: The internal origin and weak-signal product sequence were absent from prior AI LOVERS Claude Code coverage.

cta.text: Возьмите один внутренний инструмент и проверьте: кто запускает его без напоминания, какую повторяющуюся боль он снимает и какой рабочий артефакт остаётся после использования?

posts.format_change_reason: None; retained the radar's story_lore format.

posts.focus: The documented sequence shows safeguards becoming an operational governance loop rather than a static release claim.
posts.behavioral_transition: From declaring safeguards at launch to defining severity, disclosure, stop, restoration, and decision ownership.
posts.tension: More capable agents create dual-use value while static safety promises do not specify what happens after a bad signal.
posts.coverage_delta: The complete governance sequence and its operational meaning were absent from the prior Fable return post.

cta.text: Для одного рабочего агента выпишите четыре уровня реакции: записать наблюдение, запросить подтверждение, остановить процесс, вернуть его в работу — и назначьте владельца каждого решения.

posts.format_change_reason: None; retained the radar's story_lore format.

posts.focus: AI security findings now enter the pull-request review loop but remain labeled, informational, and human-decided.
posts.behavioral_transition: From a separate security step to labeled AI findings inside the pull request before merge.
posts.tension: AI speeds code creation while review quality and false positives still require human judgment.
posts.coverage_delta: PR-native AI findings, prerequisites, billing, and non-blocking status were not previously covered.

cta.text: На одном некритичном репозитории сравните обычный review с новым слоем: сколько находок подтвердилось и сколько оказалось шумом?

posts.format_change_reason: None; retained the radar's flash format.

posts.focus: GitHub Models users have a concrete migration deadline and a scheduled failure drill before shutdown.
posts.behavioral_transition: From assuming a stable provider endpoint to inventorying the dependency and testing a fallback.
posts.tension: A convenient hosted model layer can disappear faster than the workflow built around it.
posts.coverage_delta: The shutdown, brownouts, and July 30 migration deadline were absent from prior model-routing coverage.

cta.text: До 23 июля найдите все вызовы, назначьте fallback и прогоните через него один реальный запрос.

posts.format_change_reason: None; retained the radar's flash format.

unresolved_items: GitHub AI security detections remain a partial-availability public preview and require a final human eligibility check before publication.
GitHub Models retirement dates are time-sensitive; recheck the July 23 brownout and July 30 shutdown immediately before publication.
